stmt: ∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → x ≐ ⊠x
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (⊬ □g.1)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α}, h.1 ≤ ⊠h.1 → h.1 ≤ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x y : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → y ≐ ⊠y → x ≐ y
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → ¬ (⊬ x)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (⊬ g.1)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ¬ (⊬ (□(⊠(⊤ : α))))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x y : α}, x ≤ □x → x ≤ ⊠x → x ≤ ⊠y
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x : α, ¬ (⊬ (⊠x))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → (x ≐ ⊠x ↔ ⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x ↔ x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)) ↔ (⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x ↔ x ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ((⊠(⊤ : α)) ≐ □(⊠(⊤ : α))) ↔ ∀ {x : α}, x ≐ ⊠x → x ≐ □x)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ((⊠⊠(⊤ : α)) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Inconsistent α ↔ ∀ x : α, ⊬ x
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → (ACR.Consistent α ↔ ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ¬ (⊬ g.1))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ {x : α}, (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, x ≐ g.1) → ¬ (⊬ x)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ n : Nat, ¬ (⊬ ((Nat.iterate (fun x : α => □x) n) (⊠(⊤ : α))))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ {x : α}, x ≤ □x → x ≤ ⊠x → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, x ≤ g.1
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → (ACR.Consistent α ↔ ∀ x : α, ¬ (⊬ (⊠ x)))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x : α, ∀ n : Nat, ¬ (⊬ ((Nat.iterate (fun y : α => □ y) n) (⊠ x)))
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ⊠⊠(⊤ : α) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α) → ∀ n : Nat, (Nat.iterate (fun y : α => ⊠ y) (n + 1) (⊤ : α)) ≐ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type _} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x : α, ⊠⊠x ≤ ⊠x
